steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage lists examples spanning "everything from monumental sculptures like Cloud Gate... to innovative street art like High Tide." This range of types leads to the conclusion that "The ______ public art... can satisfy any art lover." The blank must explain why all types of art lovers are satisfied — the word must describe the wide variety or range on display.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
The word needs to mean wide variety or range. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — controversy over: the controversy over public art in Chicago can satisfy any art lover — controversy does not satisfy art lovers; it introduces conflict, not appreciation. ✗
  • Choice B — breadth of: the breadth of public art in Chicago can satisfy any art lover — breadth means wide range, which directly explains why all tastes are satisfied: every type of art lover finds something that appeals to them. ✓
  • Choice C — apathy toward: the apathy toward public art in Chicago can satisfy any art lover — apathy means indifference; indifference cannot satisfy anyone’s love of art. ✗
  • Choice D — confusion about: the confusion about public art in Chicago can satisfy any art lover — confusion is a negative state that would discourage rather than satisfy art lovers. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
